name: Image
summary: Theme-aware `` wrapper with sizing and object-fit ergonomics for static raster/vector images; use it for content imagery, and `Avatar` for circular user pictures or `Video` for playable media.

bestPractices: Always set alt text; use empty alt for decorative images.
Avoid layout shift: a NUMERIC width AND height emit the native size attributes so the browser reserves space, or set `aspectRatio` (a number is the literal ratio — pass `16 / 9`, not `16`).
Choose fit (`cover`/`contain`) and objectPosition deliberately to control cropping/focus.
Use srcSet/sizes (native `` passthrough) for responsive sources — valet has no build-step optimizer, so caller-provided sources are the responsive story.
Lazy-loads + async-decodes by default; set `priority` for an above-the-fold/LCP hero (eager + fetchPriority=high). An explicit loading/fetchPriority still wins.
Round corners with the `radius` prop (number → theme.radius(n), scales with density); reach for a parent `overflow: hidden` wrapper only to clip overflowing/child content.
Pass `fallback` to degrade a broken image gracefully (rendered onError); without it a failed load behaves like a native .
Avoid background images for content; prefer `<Image>` so a11y tools and AI proxies can interpret it.
